---
title: "Engagements"
listing:
  - id: future-activities
    contents: engagements/future/*.qmd
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort: "date asc"
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
    page-size: 12
  - id: past-activities
    contents: engagements/past/*.qmd
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
    page-size: 12
---

This page collects talks, workshops, panels, podcasts, public programs, and other events I have participated in or will participate in.

## Future activities

::: {#future-activities}
:::

## Past activities

::: {#past-activities}
:::
